steps.title: Identify the claim
steps.content: The student claims The Horse Fair marks a significant change in Bonheur's artistic development. To support this, we need a quote that explicitly contrasts Bonheur's pre- and post-Horse Fair styles.

steps.title: Match the quote
steps.content:
A says paintings before The Horse Fair belong to her "earlier style, to which she never returned" — a direct statement that The Horse Fair divides her career into distinct phases. That's exactly the change-marker the claim needs.

B is about quality (not change). C is about interpretive disagreement. D is about influences and being ahead of her time, not about a stylistic shift in her own development.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
